AllPrepare To ScareRobot TakeoverCats vs BirdsHorse Jumping

Robot Takeover

My first self-made game. It's an FPS where you need to shoot robots to win, with two guns and a grappling hook.

Key Features

  • Different guns
  • AI pathfinding
  • Grappling hook

Technologies Used

C#, Unity
